name: Three-Cheese Pasta Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a square baking dish measuring 8x8x2 inches.
3. Cook and drain the pasta according to the package instructions.
4. Mix the cooked pasta with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
6. Bake uncovered for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the center is set and the edges are golden brown.
7. Allow the baked pasta to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
